userStories.title: Throughput Recovery: Identifying the Slow-Path
userStories.description: Throughput dropped from 5.3 to 1.9 msg/sec. 1) Analyze `src/rule_based_extractor.py` and `src/multi_pick_validator.py` for expensive operations added overnight (e.g. heavy fuzzy matching or recursive regex). 2) Revert or optimize any logic that adds >100ms per message. 3) Restore the `ProviderStriping` strategy in `src/parallel_batch_processor.py` if it was modified.

userStories.title: Recall Preservation: Regex Auditing
userStories.description: Recall is currently 78%. We must keep this win. Audit the newly added regex patterns in `src/rule_based_extractor.py`. Simplify any 'catastrophic backtracking' patterns while keeping the coverage for new formats discovered during the marathon.
acceptanceCriteria: Regex patterns are documented and optimized for speed.
Zero crashes on the full 500-message set.

userStories.title: Resilience & Crash Prevention
userStories.description: The marathon crashed. 1) Implement robust exception handling in `src/extraction_pipeline.py` around the final filtering and logging steps. 2) Ensure `progress.md` is updated using a 'safe-write' (write to temp then rename) pattern to prevent file wiping on crash.
acceptanceCriteria: Full benchmark run (500 items) completes without a single unhandled exception.
Progress log is properly populated with the 'Recovery' notes.
